message:
fix(doc): enable 11 previously-ignored doc tests across 9 modules

Enable doc tests that only needed use imports and minor API fixes:
- bloom_filter: 2 doc tests (BloomFilter, CountingBloomFilter) + add Serialize/Deserialize derives
- ring_buffer: 1 doc test + add #[must_use] to iter()
- reservoir_sampler: 1 doc test (ReservoirSampler)
- stream_hash: 1 doc test (StreamHash)
- xor_filter: 2 doc tests (XorFilter, XorFilter16)
- exp_histogram: 1 doc test (ExpHistogram)
- telemetry: 1 doc test (ScopeTimer + MetricRegistry)
- completion_token: 1 doc test (fix begin() -> unwrap(), token.id -> token_id)
- watcher_client: 1 doc test (fix mut, unwrap(), add ActionKind import)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
